title: Create: Fastfood
description: A Create mod addon, which adds Fastfood stuff.
body:
# Create: Fastfood

**- This mod will no longer be updated!**

Create: Fastfood is a Create mod addon which is meant to make creating Fastfood restaurants in Minecraft easier. You can automate making Burgers,Fries,Wings,etc...

# Recipes

Recipes are complicated, use EMI: [EMI Recipe Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) to know the recipes

**_Recipes are not made to be realistic ( For now )._**
